# Pull request

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change and why. Link any related issue: Closes #__ -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new source
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes and `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] New pure functions have network-free unit tests
- [ ] Core engine still imports with **no third-party dependencies**
- [ ] No secrets, real emails, or scraped PII included
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
- [ ] Change respects the [responsible-use](../docs/responsible-use.md) principles
